# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# CrucibAI — Backend Dependencies
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# IMPORTANT: The canonical, pinned dependency list lives in:
#       backend/requirements.txt
#
# This file is kept as a convenience shim so that ``pip install -r requirements.txt``
# from the repo root installs the correct versions.  Do NOT edit this file
# directly — edit backend/requirements.txt instead, then re-run:
#
#       cp backend/requirements.txt requirements.txt
#
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
-r backend/requirements.txt
